sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT, description VARCHAR(255), xml_data XML);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, description, xml_data) VALUES (1, 'Test 1', '1');
INSERT INTO test_table (id, description, xml_data) VALUES (2, '', '2');
INSERT INTO test_table (id, description, xml_data) VALUES (3, NULL, '33.5');
SELECT id, regexp_parse(description, '1') AS match_info FROM test_table WHERE id = (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE description IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1);
SELECT id, xml_tree_doc(xml_data) AS parsed_xml FROM test_table WHERE regexp_parse(description, 'Test [0-9]+') IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY regexp_parse(description, '1')[1]) AS count_matches FROM test_table HAVING count_matches > 0;
SELECT id, regexp_parse(description, '^(?:(\w+)(\d+))?') AS regex_results FROM test_table WHERE description IS NOT NULL OR xml_data IS NULL;
SELECT id, xml_tree_doc('<root><data>' || COALESCE(NULLIF(description, ''), 'empty') || '</data></root>') AS transformed_xml FROM test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE id < 4);
SELECT id, regexp_parse((SELECT description FROM test_table WHERE id = 1), 'Test (?<num>[0-9]+)') AS sub_matches FROM test_table;
